change.description: Remove c2 from the no-flag batched_lm_head sampler-evidence defaults, returning c2 to serial_lm_head while leaving c4/c8 batched defaults intact. The rejected intermediate 1024-element c2 stabilizer was not kept.

commands.default1024_before_demotion: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --batch-size 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-iter361-c2-stabilize1024/postchange-default1024-<n>.json after temporary default1024 edit
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.post_demotion_serial: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --batch-size 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-iter361-c2-stabilize1024/postdemote-default-serial-<n>.json after removing c2 from sampler evidence defaults

conclusion: C2 batched_lm_head remains intermittent even with a wider 1024-element post-sampler stabilizer: four forced 1024 runs and four temporary no-flag default1024 runs were green, but the required active verify immediately afterward reproduced the token-104 flake at [137,104]. Removing c2 from the no-flag sampler-evidence defaults returns c2 to serial_lm_head; six immediate no-flag serial repeats plus the final active verify were green at [137,137], with native_caware_decode=true and no decode blockers. This is correctness-first stability evidence only and makes no retained throughput/scaling claim.

prompt_verifier.evidence: Pass: the iteration restores the required c2 generated-token equality gate after rejecting a focused 1024 stabilizer attempt, and records c2 [137,137] final active equality with native decode still c-aware/no decode blockers on GPU1/XTX. No retained throughput/scaling claim.

active_verify_final.decision_reason: artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive_correctness_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; c1_baseline_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; serial_bridge_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive c>N correctness gate did not pass: no primitive correctness artifact path provided; scaling comparison vs c=1 and serial bridge baselines is incomplete; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.requested_mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.native_row_aware_lm_head must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.c2_equality_green must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_rows must be an int; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_artifact must be under benchmarks/results; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits
active_verify_final.label: active_c2_verify_final_serial
